flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Glendale Community College fell 48% between 2009 and 2010 (15.1% → 7.8%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Glendale Community College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.9k → $9.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Glendale Community College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.1k → $2.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Glendale Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.4% → 0.0%).
